description: Registers consumer repositories whose live .github/workflows files are exact-managed from canonical starter templates in this shared workflow asset library.

managedBindings.notes: Target the repository default branch when baseBranch is omitted. Current observed default branch: feature/package-cli-app. Consumer repo must provide the vars and secrets expected by the shared CodeRabbit PR trigger template.

Target the repository default branch when baseBranch is omitted. Current observed default branch: feature/package-cli-app. Consumer repo must provide the vars and secrets expected by the shared CodeRabbit manual trigger template.

Target the repository default branch when baseBranch is omitted. Current observed default branch: feature/package-cli-app. Consumer repo must provide the vars and secrets expected by the shared CodeRabbit comment trigger template.
